capabilities.not_to_assume: Do not assume GPT-4o Vision is accessible or that screenshots can be captured from user environment without explicit permission.
capabilities.auditor_notes: Classified R0 because evidence_status=STATIC_CATALOG. If M2 verifies API access, would elevate to R1 (public read) or R2 (if screenshots touch user data).

capabilities.not_to_assume: Do not assume Claude Opus 4 extended thinking is available at the stated context size or that Anthropic API key is configured.
capabilities.auditor_notes: Classified R0 because evidence_status=STATIC_CATALOG. High cost_risk due to large context window pricing. If verified, would be R1 (isolated reasoning, no user data).

capabilities.not_to_assume: Do not assume 1M context is available in production or that ingesting the full Monstruo corpus is safe without data classification.
capabilities.auditor_notes: Classified R0 because evidence_status=STATIC_CATALOG. Application proposes ingesting full corpus -> would be R2 (user_data_touch) if verified. Grounding API adds prompt_injection_surface MEDIUM.

capabilities.not_to_assume: Do not assume Grok 3 DeepSearch returns trustworthy citations without validation. High prompt_injection_surface due to web content ingestion.
capabilities.auditor_notes: Classified R0 because evidence_status=STATIC_CATALOG. If verified, would be R1 (public read). prompt_injection_surface=HIGH because web content is untrusted input.

capabilities.not_to_assume: Do not assume Perplexity citations are always accurate or that the model version matches the cataloged one.
capabilities.auditor_notes: Classified R0 because evidence_status=STATIC_CATALOG. Similar profile to Grok 3 — web search = HIGH injection surface. If verified, R1.

capabilities.not_to_assume: Do not assume GPU allocation is available or that self-hosting is cost-effective without infrastructure analysis.
capabilities.auditor_notes: Classified R0 because evidence_status=STATIC_CATALOG. Self-hosted = no external API required, no secrets for inference. But cost_risk=HIGH due to GPU infrastructure. If deployed, could be R1 (isolated) or R4 (if given code_write access).
